description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden filing cabinet with a dark brown wood grain finish. The front side features multiple storage compartments, including a large cabinet door, a set of open shelves, and a pull-out drawer, all integrated into a modern, streamlined design. The top surface is broad and flat, suitable for placing office equipment or documents. The sides and back are solid panels with a consistent wood texture, giving the piece a sturdy and cohesive appearance. There are no visible handles, suggesting a push-to-open mechanism or recessed grips for the drawers and doors. The overall construction appears robust, making it suitable for heavy-duty office or administrative use.
description: A large, dark wood grain filing cabinet with multiple storage compartments and a broad, flat top. It features a modern, handle-less design with open shelves and a pull-out drawer.
description_view_0: The end view shows a solid, flat wood panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_1: The front view reveals the main storage compartments: a large cabinet door, open shelves, and a pull-out drawer, all with a handle-less design.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors the first, showing a solid wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a continuous wood panel with a large door on one side and an open leg space on the other, maintaining the clean, modern look.
